content_body: We had such a wonderful time! Your house is beautiful, warm and comfortable. It's so peaceful here. The view is spectacular. We spent a day at Amicalola Falls, which was a great hike. We spent a day at the Tennessee Aquarium in Chattanooga, TN which was awesome. We also went to Ruby Falls, which the kids really enjoyed. We took a ride on the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway and waved to Riverview Lodge as we rode by! Our last day we went back to Chattanooga and rode the Tennessee Valley Railway (short ride) then rode the incline railway, then visited the Chattanooga Choo-Choo Hotel - great fun for the train buffs! Our nights we spent in the hot tub, gazing at the stars. We slept great here, the beds are so comfortable! We greatly appreciate you allowing us to share in your home! It's truly special here. Thank you for everything!
title: Train Afficionados Enjoy the Blue Ridge Mountains
